Class SecurityPositionSummary

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.SecuritycurrencyPositionSummary<Security>
grafioschtrader.reportviews.securityaccount.SecurityPositionSummary
public class SecurityPositionSummary extends SecuritycurrencyPositionSummary<Security>
One for every single security. It contain also data of a single transaction, those data are probably transfered to other instance, for example when used for security transaction report.

    • excludedDivTax

      public double excludedDivTax
      Excluded dividend tax in security currency (when excludeDivTaxcost is enabled)

    • excludedDivTaxMC

      public double excludedDivTaxMC
      Excluded dividend tax converted to main currency

    • balanceSecurityCurrency

      public double balanceSecurityCurrency
      Security currency balance for internal tracking

    • reCalculateOpenPosition

      public boolean reCalculateOpenPosition
      Flag indicating whether open positions need recalculation, typically used in watchlist scenarios where position data may become stale and require refresh from current market data and transaction history.

    • transactionGainLoss

      public Double transactionGainLoss
      Gain or loss for a specific transaction in the security's native currency. Used during transaction processing and detailed transaction analysis to track individual trade performance within the overall position.

    • transactionGainLossPercentage

      public Double transactionGainLossPercentage

      public Double transactionGainLossMC

    • resetForOpenMargin

      public void resetForOpenMargin()
      Resets position metrics for open margin calculation scenarios. Used when recalculating margin positions from transaction history, ensuring clean starting state for accurate position reconstruction.

    • calcGainLossByPrice

      public void calcGainLossByPrice(Double price)

    • calcMainCurrency

      public void calcMainCurrency(double currencyExchangeRate)
      Converts security currency values to main currency using the specified exchange rate.
      Parameters:
      currencyExchangeRate - exchange rate from security currency to main currency

    • getPositionGainLossPercentage

      public double getPositionGainLossPercentage()
      Calculates percentage gain/loss for the entire position with margin instrument handling. Provides relative performance measurement that accounts for the different calculation methodologies required for standard instruments versus margin positions.
      Returns:
      percentage gain/loss for the position
